meaning: n.泰萨(Tess的异体)(f.)  免税特别储蓄账户 TESSA(tax exempt special savings account)
examples: Tessa was evasive about why she had not been at home that night.
May I ask your name? S: Tessa.
Tessa is an interesting British girl.
He will be meeting Wells Lib Dem MP Tessa Munt to raise the issue with her.
She then picked up her 6-year-old daughter, Tessa, who buried her head in her mother's shoulder.
